description: Papaya Global provides global payroll and workforce payment services. Its public developer documentation covers APIs for workforce payments, beneficiaries, wallets, groups, payment instructions, and related webhooks.
summary: Papaya Global exposes one documented developer surface: a REST Workforce Payments API at `https://api.papayaglobal.com`, authenticated with a short-lived bearer token minted from Papaya-issued `api_key` and `client_secret` credentials.
